chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS First Appeal No.S-02 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A No.86/2026. 3. For hearing of main case. 12.03.2026 Mr. Adnan Khurram Meo, advocate for appellants. Respondent is present. = Respondent is present in person. After arguing the matter at length, learned counsel for the appellants, under instructions, states that he would be satisfied if the appeal is allowed in the terms that the impugned Judgment and decree be set-aside and the matter is remanded back to the learned trial court subject to furnishing sum of Rs.400,000/- with the learned trial court within 20 days from the date of passing of this Order. Order accordingly. In view of the above, the instant appeal is allowed and the impugned Judgment and decree dated 24.12.2025 passed by learned Additional District Judge-II, Mirpurkhas in Summary Suit No.12/2025 are set-aside and the matter is remanded back to the learned trial court to conclude the trial within 60 days from the date of receipt of this Order, whereby no unnecessary adjournment shall be granted to any of the parties and the appellants shall furnish sum of Rs.400,000/- with the trial court and compliance report be filed in this regard with the Additional Registrar of this Court. The instant appeal is disposed of alongwith listed application in above terms. JUDGE *Faisal*
